description: This file is a build script for compiling plugin JavaScript files in the Bootstrap project. It uses Rollup and Babel for bundling and transpilation, and dynamically processes source files to output build artifacts. It includes functions to resolve file paths, convert filenames to class names, and orchestrates the build process for multiple plugins.

methods.name: filenameToEntity
methods.description: Converts a filename to a class name by removing the extension and applying casing rules.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Asynchronous function that builds an individual plugin using Rollup, applying Babel transpilation and external dependencies management.
